comments.author: @DP-ie8tf
comments.text: Functional Soviet apartment blocks??? I'm Latvian. I visited Latvia during the Gorbachev era. My roomie brought American Matchbox cars for her young nephews who lived in one of those "functional" Soviet apartment blocks. The boys took the cars out to the balcony to play. A little later, one came in crying, Mama, there was an accident. One of the toy cars had run into the concrete wall of the balcony. The car was okay, but the wall was chipped. Functional indeed. "Dacha" is a Russian word. Latvians prefer the Latvian word, Vasarnīca. In Latvian, the letter J is pronounced like a Y.

comments.author: @melindataljaard2753
comments.text:
I had a pen friend a long time ago when I was still very young. We wrote to each other for like 4 or 5 years. That was so wonderful every time I've got a letter from her. We shared a lot with each other. But sadly we stop writing to each other. M
Lost contact ever since. Now I'm in my 60s and still wondering where my Latvian pen friend are 😢.
